question.label: Recent example
question.name: What is one recent piece of your brand work that best shows your current quality bar?
question.description: Asks for a concrete artifact that reveals how he is actually applying his standards.

answer: I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.

assessment.note: Asked for a recent example, but he named a missing standard instead — strong clarity gap, with mild disengagement from not owning a concrete example.

new_queue.label: Excellent work examples
new_queue.name: What examples of excellent junior-level work feel missing to you right now?

new_queue.label: Missed signal
new_queue.name: Where do you think your work most often misses the mark?

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is the main thing that is slowing your growth right now?

new_queue.label: Practice focus
new_queue.name: What one design habit do you want to practice over the next few weeks?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help you make that practice stick this month?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.
